ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick Miller appeared by zoom for and with Antonio Blandon by zoom.

Mr. Miller stated that the decedent had been dealing with a medical condition from 2018 up to the time of her death, that Mr. Yamasaki was in the process of retiring when his client went to the appointment with his mother, that Mr. Yamasaki instructed them to go to a neighboring place of business to get the will notarized, that they returned to Mr. Yamasaki's office and that it is his understanding that Mr. Yamasaki kept the will. Mr. Miller also stated that he has not heard of any objections. The court finds that the presumption under Probate Code 6124 does not apply. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated December 1, 2015, is admitted to probate. Antonio Edgar Blandon is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 19, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
